Comment.value: Called from Clone Tag Values
when this script is called we clone WITHOUT checking if it already exist an old cloned Tag
This script clones ALL Tags in the list, including List and List items (and texts)

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tag_id" ; $old_tag_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id )
We call the parameter old_tag_id for "chosen_old_tag_id" because we will loop later fthrough all tags in the tag list using the variable name old_tag_id

The process is the following (only called if clone_title or clone_settings include "Tags"): 1. Check if new Tag is already created by checking OldPrimaryKeyFromClone. If found - connect this Tag id 2. If not found - call script "Clone Tag" which will return a new Tag id 3. Clone Tag will duplicate full Tag Filter list, including List, List items and Tags. For Pre-defined tags, the list will not be created.
Duplicate Tags - preparing for page items to link via Old PrimaryKey from clone
Check how texts are handled
Find the old chosen tag from the tag value
Old list id can be empty if pre-defined list
Pre-defined list - the pre-defined list id is not unique between titles
Find all Tags that uses the predefined list
Check if List exist as OldPrimaryKey
If List isn't found - create a new list

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_list_id" ; $old_list_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id )

Comment.value: Find all Tags that uses this list
All Tags (=list items if List) are now in found set
Loop through all Tags that uses this list or the pre-defined list
Match each Tag towards the new list item
Duplicate Tags
Pre-defined list from Funkis Cloud etc

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Tag::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "tag" ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName (FAT Tag::Name text id) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

Comment.value: Title list
Find the original from clone
Return the new Tag id
